Drive for 4 hours and grabbed fast food for the ride. Drank 2 alcoholic drinks normally drink only during special occasions. Had some candy and snacks I normally don't eat candies or excess snacks. Also ate way too many calories with too many carbs and fats with little protein.
I over ate visiting friends, drank alcohol when I normally don't drink and ate a lot of processed foods when I normally make my own food.
I over ate, didn't hit my protein goal and had a 5 and a half hour drive so I was snacking to stay awake.
